race.comment: TESSATORI (5) failed to fire in two runs last preparation but is better judged on earlier form and, returning from a lengthy absence, she makes plenty of appeal if ready to roll, with market support worth noting. KID DYNAMITE (3) made a highly encouraging return when coming from well back to score narrowly over this trip in a BM56 and, from a draw that may allow him to settle closer, he looks a major player to go in again. BRING ME POWER (4) caused an upset when winning first up last campaign and, resuming again here, could easily outrun expectations. KYLE (2) arrives in good order and, despite the burden of a big weight, rates a likely contender to give another bold sight.
